creator: alexander.4mail@gmail.com
text:
update security/kpcli from 1.6 to 1.7

Fix: --VS++wcV0S1rZb1Fb
Content-Type: text/x-diff; charset=us-ascii
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="kpcli.diff"



--VS++wcV0S1rZb1Fb----99R9gnp9cvFZzsjNJqVewAKDdOZq3KCQ0v2sbGho47RtaQbA
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
--- Makefile	(revision 316837)
+++ Makefile	(working copy)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	kpcli
-PORTVERSION=	1.6
+PORTVERSION=	1.7
 CATEGORIES=	security
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/kpcli/
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.pl
Index: distinfo
===================================================================
--- distinfo	(revision 316837)
+++ distinfo	(working copy)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (kpcli-1.6.pl) = 71949dfe3356bb31e96427cd862f3fd8a73eaff922359e89f5094a87f9f2bdda
-SIZE (kpcli-1.6.pl) = 72331
+SHA256 (kpcli-1.7.pl) = 6029dd27977c31bb90f8367d047ed629ce06c01dbaaf73a3b493445d44aa2ce9
+SIZE (kpcli-1.7.pl) = 74549
